cmd:
bash -c 
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
           gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -50

bash -c 
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
           gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -45

bash -c 
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
           gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -45

bash -c 
cmake -S /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src \
  -B /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo >/dev/null 2>&1 &&
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
           gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -40

bash -c 
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip \
  --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test \
           gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1 | tail -40

bash -c 
cmake -S . -B build-hip -G Ninja \
  -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a \
  -DCMAKE_HIP_COMPILER=/opt/rocm/llvm/bin/clang++ \
  -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
  -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=RelWithDebInfo 2>&1 && \
cmake --build build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16 2>&1
cmake --build /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/dietgpu/src/build-hip --target ans_test ans_statistics_test batch_prefix_sum_test float_test gpu_ans gpu_float_compress dietgpu_utils -j 16
